mapper.sql: ID, STRING_VALUE, INT_VALUE, BOOLEAN_VALUE, LONG_VALUE, FLOAT_VALUE, DOUBLE_VALUE, BIG_DECIMAL_VALUE, DATE_VALUE, TIME_VALUE, DATETIME_VALUE, BYTES_VALUE
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TB_TEST_DATA_TYPE ORDER BY ID

SELECT FROM TB_TEST_DATA_TYPE
AND STRING_VALUE LIKE '%' || #{search.stringValue} || '%'
ORDER BY ID

SELECT FROM TB_TEST_DATA_TYPE
AND STRING_VALUE LIKE '%' || #{search.stringValue} || '%'
ORDER BY ID
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_TEST_DATA_TYPE SET STRING_VALUE = #{stringValue}, INT_VALUE = #{intValue}, BOOLEAN_VALUE = #{booleanValue}, LONG_VALUE = #{longValue}, FLOAT_VALUE = #{floatValue}, DOUBLE_VALUE = #{doubleValue}, BIG_DECIMAL_VALUE = #{bigDecimalValue}, DATE_VALUE = #{dateValue}, TIME_VALUE = #{timeValue}, DATETIME_VALUE = #{datetimeValue}, BYTES_VALUE = #{bytesValue} WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE TB_TEST_DATA_TYPE SET STRING_VALUE = #{stringValue}, INT_VALUE = #{intValue}, BOOLEAN_VALUE = #{booleanValue}, LONG_VALUE = #{longValue}, FLOAT_VALUE = #{floatValue}, DOUBLE_VALUE = #{doubleValue}, BIG_DECIMAL_VALUE = #{bigDecimalValue}, DATE_VALUE = #{dateValue}, TIME_VALUE = #{timeValue}, DATETIME_VALUE = #{datetimeValue}, BYTES_VALUE = #{bytesValue} WHERE ID = #{id}
